creator: javpra@yahoo.com
text:
XX# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
XX# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
XX# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
XX# have default permissions.
XX#
XX# This archive contains:
XX#
XX#     /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/
XX#     /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/Makefile
XX#     /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/distinfo
XX#     /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-descr
XX#     /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-plist
XX#     /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/sharout.sh
XX#
XXecho c - /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/
XXmkdir -p /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/ > /dev/null 2>&1
XXecho x - /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/Makefile
XXsed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/Makefile'
XXX# New ports collection makefile for:   metamorphose
XXX# Date created:        28 September 2007
XXX# Whom:                javier
XXX#
XXX# $FreeBSD$
XXX#
XXX
XXXPORTNAME=    metamorphose
XXXPORTVERSION= 1.1
XXXCATEGORIES=  sysutils
XXXMASTER_SITES=        ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XXXMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=  file-folder-ren
XXXDISTNAME=    metamorphose_1.1.0
XXX
XXXMAINTAINER=  javpra@FreeBSD.org
XXXCOMMENT=     A program to rename files and folders
XXX
XXXRUN_DEPENDS= python:${PORTSDIR}/lang/python24 wxgtk2-unicode:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/wxgtk26-unicode
XXX
XXXUSE_GMAKE=   yes

XXXUSE_GETTEXT= YES
XXXMANCOMPRESSED=       yes
XXX#MAN1=       metamorphose.1
XXXUSE_PYTHON=  2.4
XXXUSE_WX=      2.6
XXXWITH_UNICODE=        YES
XXXWX_COMPS=    python
XXXWX_UNICODE=  YES
XXX
XXXNO_INSTALL_MANPAGES= YES
XXX
XXX.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
XXX
XXX.if ((${OSVERSION} < 500000))
XXXIGNORE=      systems prior to FreeBSD 5.0 do not support Unicode
XXX.endif
XXX
XXX.if defined (WITHOUT_NLS)
XXXUSE_GETTEXT= NO
XXX.endif
XXX
XXX.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
XXEND-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/Makefile
XXecho x - /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/distinfo
XXsed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/distinfo << 'END-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/distinfo'
XXXMD5 (metamorphose_1.1.0.tar.gz) = eb39846b45d687b64467f93452b5a89c
XXXSHA256 (metamorphose_1.1.0.tar.gz) = 8dc2e0f1842b9232ff7c894ee873bf2b1689d17685b3664f520f9c899afef1a1
XXXSIZE (metamorphose_1.1.0.tar.gz) = 691360
XXEND-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/distinfo
XXecho x - /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-descr
XXsed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-descr << 'END-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-descr'
XXXMetamorphose flexibly renames files and folders using an intuitive interface.
XXX
XXXWWW: http://file-folder-ren.sourceforge.net/
XXEND-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-descr
XXecho x - /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-plist
XXsed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-plist << 'END-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-plist'
XXX@dirrm metamorphose-1.1
XXEND-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/pkg-plist
XXecho x - /usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/sharout.sh
XXsed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/sharout.sh << 'END-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/sharout.sh'
XEND-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/sharout.sh
Xexit
X
END-of-/usr/ports/sysutils/metamorphose/sharout.sh
exit
